title: VCP Plan
description: An ordered set of proposed capability invocations produced by the Planner. The Planner has no authority; a plan is a proposal only. The Gateway computes plan_hash = sha256(JCS(plan)) and binds approval and grants to it. See SPECIFICATION.md §9.

id.description: Step identifier, unique within the plan, e.g. s1.

capability.description: Content-addressed capability id. Binding is to identity, never name (§4).

arguments.description: Arguments MUST validate against the capability's input_schema.

depends_on.description: Step ids this step consumes output from. Used for taint propagation (§12).

consumes.description: Declared inputs with taint labels, feeding the §6 data_flows.

why.description: Human-readable justification shown at approval time.

source.description: Logical source, e.g. email.inbox or step:s1.

label.description: Taint label (§12). Authority MUST NOT flow from untrusted_* labels.

classification.description: Optional sensitivity tag, e.g. personal, confidential.
